---
name: repo-hygiene
about: Weekly repo hygiene checklist
labels: [maintenance, governance]
---

## Repo Hygiene Checklist

- [ ] Close stale PRs
- [ ] Archive dead branches
- [ ] Review failed workflows
- [ ] Rotate/revoke old tokens
- [ ] Inspect pre-push severity findings
- [ ] Update governance docs
- [ ] Remove duplicate scripts/tools
- [ ] Validate MCP routing boundaries
